tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: init.sh run from $FRAMEWORK exits non-zero with 'Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo' (PR #18 U-N/U-O fix verified)

tests.name: baseline_personal_built_to_phase_2
tests.details: Built personal/web/full baseline; recorded one feature (uat-feat-1) via test-gate.sh --record-feature; build_loop completed all 6 steps

tests.name: upgrade_command_exits_zero
tests.details: Runbook-literal `intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment private_poc` rejected by argument validator: '[FAIL] Invalid target deployment: private_poc (must be: personal, organizational)'. Falling back to `--upgrade-deployment organizational` (closest documented path; there is NO documented personal->private_poc path), the upgrade body executes successfully, but the script then aborts at end with RC=1 due to a `cp: ... are identical (not copied)` failure under set -euo pipefail when refreshing helper scripts.

tests.name: process_state_preserved
tests.details: .build_loop reset to idle (expected post-feature_recorded); .features_completed still ['uat-feat-1'] in .claude/build-progress.json

tests.name: new_required_artifacts_listed
tests.details: Upgrade output lists: 'Fill in Pre-Phase 0 organizational pre-conditions in APPROVAL_LOG.md', 'Complete Section 8 of PROJECT_INTAKE.md (governance pre-flight)', 'Assign approval authorities for each phase gate'

tests.name: pending_approval_sentinel_respected
tests.details: With .claude/pending-approval.json present, intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment organizational refused with 'upgrade blocked — pending user decision' (PR #17 U-F fix verified). After scripts/pending-approval.sh --clear, upgrade proceeded.

tests.name: upgrade_changelog_present_in_script
tests.details: scripts/upgrade-project.sh header changelog mentions BL-006 (2026-04-24) and BL-015 (2026-04-25)

tests.name: no_template_placeholders_in_output

tests.name: U-J_phase_state_deployment_field_stale

framework_bugs.summary: intake-wizard --upgrade-deployment private_poc rejected; no path personal->private_poc exists
framework_bugs.expected: Per RUNBOOK Section F (line 289), `bash scripts/intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment private_poc` should upgrade a personal project to private_poc deployment.
framework_bugs.actual: intake-wizard.sh validator (script lines 1584-1593) and upgrade-project.sh validator (line 386) accept only 'personal|organizational' for --deployment. Output: '[FAIL] Invalid target deployment: private_poc (must be: personal, organizational)'. upgrade-project.sh --help documents only these POC paths: 'private_poc -> sponsored_poc, private_poc -> production, sponsored_poc -> production'. There is NO documented mechanism to take a personal project into private_poc — neither --to-private-poc nor --gov-mode flag exists. The runbook command is unrunnable; entire upgrade-from=personal target=private_poc matrix cell is blocked unless agent silently substitutes '--upgrade-deployment organizational' (which leaves poc_mode=null).

framework_bugs.summary: upgrade-project.sh helper-refresh cp self-copy aborts upgrade under set -euo pipefail
framework_bugs.reproduction: cd <project>; bash scripts/intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment organizational  # which exec's bash scripts/upgrade-project.sh --deployment organizational from project dir
framework_bugs.expected: Upgrade exits 0 after 'Upgrade Complete' banner; post-upgrade validation runs.
framework_bugs.actual: scripts/upgrade-project.sh:1469-1480 ('Refreshing framework helper scripts (BL-009, BL-015)') iterates pending-approval.sh / lint-uat-scenarios.sh and does `cp "$SCRIPT_DIR/$helper" "scripts/$helper"`. Because the project's own scripts/upgrade-project.sh was invoked (intake-wizard exec'd `bash scripts/upgrade-project.sh ...` from project), SCRIPT_DIR resolves to the project's own scripts/ dir — so source and destination paths refer to the same inode. macOS cp prints `cp: scripts/pending-approval.sh and <project>/scripts/pending-approval.sh are identical (not copied)` and returns non-zero; with `set -euo pipefail` (line 2) the entire upgrade aborts with RC=1. Post-upgrade validation (line 1483 onward) and the final `Upgrade complete.` print never run from the user's perspective in CI/non-interactive contexts. Fix: gate the cp on inode comparison ([ "$src" -ef "$dest" ] || cp ...) or detect SCRIPT_DIR == PWD/scripts and skip refresh.

framework_bugs.summary: U-J confirmation: upgrade-project.sh leaves phase-state.json deployment field stale
framework_bugs.reproduction: cd <personal project at phase 0>; bash scripts/intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment organizational; jq .deployment .claude/phase-state.json
framework_bugs.expected: After --deployment upgrade, .claude/phase-state.json .deployment matches the new target ('organizational').
framework_bugs.actual: .deployment remained 'personal' in phase-state.json even though CLAUDE.md/PROJECT_INTAKE.md/APPROVAL_LOG.md were correctly restructured for organizational governance. .last_upgrade was set to '2026-04-25'. Confirms still-open prior-sweep U-J.

documentation_gaps.gap: RUNBOOK Section F (lines 287-294) prescribes `bash scripts/intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment private_poc` for private_poc/sponsored_poc targets, but neither intake-wizard.sh nor upgrade-project.sh accepts those values. Validator help text says 'personal|organizational' only. Runbook needs to either (a) document the actual command to reach private_poc from personal, or (b) be updated once the framework gains a personal->private_poc path.
documentation_gaps.where: Reports/uat-2026-04-26/RUNBOOK.md:287-294 (Section F upgrade command); scripts/intake-wizard.sh:1584-1593; scripts/upgrade-project.sh:385-389

documentation_gaps.gap: scripts/upgrade-project.sh --help documents POC mode upgrade paths but no path to *enter* a POC mode (private_poc) from a personal project. Either add a `--to-private-poc` flag or document that personal projects must be reinitialized for POC mode.

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: grep for password/api_key/secret/token in committed files matched only documentation references (CI workflow secrets context, gitleaks tool name in PROJECT_INTAKE.md, .gitignore comment, release.yml deploy-token comment) — no actual leaked secret values

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A: no FORCE/reset events occurred during this run; .claude/process-audit.log absent (expected)

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD = d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 (unchanged from setup); git status --short shows only pre-existing untracked .claude/ and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/ (the sweep results dir we wrote to)

summary: Personal/web/full baseline built cleanly via init.sh --non-interactive (Section A all green, including PR #17/#18 fixes). Section F reveals two issues: (1) the runbook-literal `intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment private_poc` is unrunnable because the validator rejects 'private_poc' and no documented personal->private_poc path exists; (2) Critical regression: upgrade-project.sh helper-refresh block performs `cp src dest` where src and dest resolve to the same inode (when invoked via the project's own scripts/), causing set -euo pipefail to abort with RC=1 post-banner. U-J also re-confirmed (.deployment stale in phase-state.json). Section G all green.
